name: privacy-legal
description: Triages processing activities, generates PIAs, reviews DPAs as controller or processor, drafts DSAR responses within statutory timelines, and monitors policy drift against practice.

interface.shortDescription: Triages processing activities, generates PIAs, reviews DPAs as controller or processor, drafts DSAR responses within statutory timelines, a…
interface.longDescription: Triages processing activities, generates PIAs, reviews DPAs as controller or processor, drafts DSAR responses within statutory timelines, and monitors policy drift against practice. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use Privacy Legal with local files or pasted text.
